PURPOSE: List of most important Tibia quests that reward shortcuts, boss and hunting ground accesses.

Start Level column is based on the earliest level you may want to start the quest for a particular access, not necessarily when you can complete the whole questline.

UPDATED: Winter Update 2025.


Start Level Quest Doable Solo Boss Access Hunt Access Other Reward/Notes
8 Killing in the Name of... Quest ✓ ✗ ✗ Boat Shortcuts
20 The Explorer Society Quest ✓ ✗ ✓ 20+ for Yalahar access, 80+ for rest of missions
30 The Ice Islands Quest ✓ ✗ ✓ Soulpit Access (Nibelor)
30 The Travelling Trader Quest ✓ ✗ ✗ Trader NPC (Rashid)
30 Barbarian Test Quest ✓ ✗ ✗ Ice Islands Pre-requisite
50 Lion's Rock Quest ✓ ✗ ✓
50 The Djinn War ✓ ✗ ✗ Trader NPCs (Choose Green or Blue)
50 The Shattered Isles Quest ✓ ✗ ✓
50 In Service of Yalahar Quest ✓ ✗ ✓
50 Blood Brothers Quest ✗ ✗ ✓
70 Galthen and the City of Gold ✓ ✓ ✓ Upper Iksupan Access
80 Threatened Dreams Quest ✓ ✓ ✓ Candia and Dream Courts Pre-requisite
80 The Thieves Guild Quest ✓ ✗ ✗ Trader NPC (Black Bert)
80 The New Frontier Quest ✗ ✗ ✓ Soloable until final
80 The Pits of Inferno Quest ✗ ✗ ✓ Inq Pre-requisite
100 Oramond Quest ✓ ✗ ✓
100 Grimvale Quest - The Curse Spreads ✓ ✓ ✓
100 Dangerous Depths Quest ✓ ✓ ✓ Tasks from 100+, Bosses from 300+
100 The Inquisition Quest ✗ ✗ ✓ Blessing of the Inquisition
100 A Pirate's Tail Quest ✓ ✓ ✓
100 Children of the Revolution Quest ✗ ✗ ✗ WOTE Pre-requisite, Soloable until final
100 Cults of Tibia Quest ✓ ✓ ✓ Accesses from 100+, Bosses from 250+
130 The Ape City Quest ✓ ✗ ✓
130 Wrath of the Emperor Quest ✗ ✗ ✓
130 Liquid Black Quest ✓ ✓ ✓
150 Bigfoot's Burden Quest ✓ ✓ ✓ Warzone 1/2/3 Access
200 Grimvale Quest - An Ancient Feud ✓ ✓ ✓
200 Twenty Miles Beneath the Sea Quest ✓ ✗ ✓
250 Grave Danger Quest ✗ ✓ ✓
250 Dark Trails Quest ✗ ✗ ✓
250 The Dream Courts Quest ✗ ✓ ✓ Soloable outside of Bosses
250 The Secret Library Quest ✗ ✓ ✓
250 Asura Palace Quest ✓ ✓ ✗ Marapur Pre-requisite
250 The Lost Brother Quest ✓ ✗ ✗ Trader NPC (Tarun), Marapur Pre-requisite
250 Within the Tides Quest ✓ ✓ ✓
250 Between the Lines Quest ✓ ✓ ✓
250 The Order of the Lion Quest ✓ ✓ ✗
250 Forgotten Knowledge Quest ✗ ✓ ✓ Powerful Imbue Access
250 Heart of Destruction Quest ✗ ✓ ✓ Powerful Imbue Access
275 The Way of the Monk Quest ✓ ✗ ✗ 10 Wheel of Destiny Points
300 Grimvale Quest - Paradise Lost ✓ ✗ ✓
300 Galthen and the Lost Queen ✓ ✓ ✓
300 Ferumbras' Ascendant Quest ✗ ✓ ✓
300 Feaster of Souls Quest ✗ ✓ ✓
300 Opticording Sphere Quest ✗ ✗ ✗ Supreme Cube, Soloable from 500+
300 Galthen and the City of Gold Part II ✓ ✓ ✓ Deeper Iksupan Access
400 Too Hot to Handle Quest ✗ ✓ ✓
400 The Cradle of Monsters Quest ✗ ✓ ✓
400 The Order of the Stag Quest ✓ ✓ ✓
400 No Rest for the Wicked Quest ✗ ✓ ✓
400 20 Years a Cook Quest ✗ ✓ ✓
400 Bloody Tusks Quest ✗ ✓ ✓
400 Kilmaresh Quest ✓ ✓ ✓
500 Soul War Quest ✗ ✓ ✓ Random Soul-set Item
500 The Roost of the Graveborn Quest ✗ ✓ ✓
500 Podzilla Quest ✗ ✓ ✓
500 Primal Ordeal Quest ✗ ✓ ✓
500 Rotten Blood Quest ✗ ✓ ✓
